articles.title: Critic’s Notebook: Conan O’Brien’s Deft Hosting and Several Sincere Moments Help Save Technically Sloppy Oscars Telecast - The Hollywood Reporter
articles.description: O'Brien delivered his second consecutive strong hosting job, and there were stirring history-making wins — but glitchy sound, confusing cutaways and erratic direction marred the night.
articles.content:
